case_title: HENRY LEE VS. JAMES SPELLMAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPELLMAN, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 482 SIXTH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94013 - UNIT 9 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $ 21.83SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SPELLMAN, JAMES
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $21.83. NO WRITTEN AGREEMENT. ALL AGREEMENTS ARE MADE ORALLY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HENRY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT SPELLMAN, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT SPELLMAN, JAMES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HENRY SERVED SEP-12-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SPELLMAN, JAMES
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT SPELLMAN, JAMES
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT SPELLMAN, JAMES
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SPELLMAN, JAMES
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SPELLMAN, JAMES
